name: Biscayne Limousine & Trnsp SVC
recent_news: No public M&A or operating news found; appears to be a very small Dania Beach livery operator.
fit_notes: Micro-scale (~4 employees, ~$273k rev) limousine/livery operator with no confirmed school-bus contracts. Not a meaningful Summit tuck-in candidate; would only be relevant if special-needs/student livery routes are documented.

name: Excelsior Limousine LLC
recent_news: No M&A or operating news found. Distinct from same-name Excelsior Limousine (Los Angeles) and Excelsior Transportation (Houston).
fit_notes: Micro Deerfield Beach livery LLC with 4 employees; no confirmed school-district contracts or yellow-bus fleet. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Lets Go Limo Inc
principals: Salvatore Frank Lonano (Vice Chair / Location Operator)
districts_or_customers: Broward and Palm Beach County point-to-point service
recent_news: Florida Profit Corporation filed 2012-01-05; family-run livery serving Fort Lauderdale, Deerfield, Boca Raton, Coral Springs. No school-district contract or M&A activity found.
fit_notes: Family-owned luxury livery, not a yellow-bus school contractor. Out of scope for Summit's school-bus tuck-in strategy despite Florida footprint.

name: RW Limo Inc
recent_news: Principal Marlena Stettner also tied to Star Limousines of Florida, Inc. (per CorporationWiki). No school-bus or special-needs district contract documented.
fit_notes: Micro Dania Beach livery business with no apparent school-bus operations. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Stepping Out Limousine

fit_notes: Micro-scale Miramar limousine operator with no documented school-bus/special-needs contract work. Not a Summit tuck-in target.
